title: Record a beginner zero-config onboarding contract
prompt: Create reports/beginner-zero-config-contract.md with sections for Login, Status gates, Media keys, Footer badges, and Bench path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Beginner Zero-Config Contract

## Login
/login connects providers; no complex config required

## Status gates
/status shows Research, Media, Bench, Privacy/ZDR, Office

## Media keys
OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY enables image/video without MCP

## Footer badges
footer shows img/vid/img·vid when keys exist; web + office always; zdr by default; premium particle chrome on without config

## Office path
SearchSkill "Word docx report" / pptx slides / xlsx sheet — catalog skills, zero MCP

## Research path
WebSearch defaults to 3 hits; Context7 for library docs; include_content capped; FetchURL for deep reads

## Bench path
/bench or node scripts/liora-agent-bench.mjs --suite seed for LioraBench
